title_cn: 技术颠覆者：SAP 首席运营官谈人工智能为何需要更好的基础
summary: “This year is a much more radical technology shift and the most consequential, I believe, ever. But still, you need all foundations of the house to be in order,” Sebastian Steinhaeuser, Chief Operating Officer at SAP, tells Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Technology Analyst Anurag Rana. In this episode of Tech Disruptors, the pair discuss SAP’s autonomous enterprise vision, the rise of Joule assistants and agents, and why AI may strengthen the case for cloud migration, data modernization, and appl

title: Gold Advances as Traders Weigh Fragile Israel-Lebanon Truce
title_cn: 交易商权衡脆弱的以色列-黎巴嫩停战协议，金价上涨
summary: Gold advanced after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a conditional ceasefire, a possible step toward resolving the wider Middle East conflict that’s upended global energy markets and raised inflation risks.

title: Being Selective in Credit is 'Critical': Pier
title_cn: 皮尔：选择性信贷“至关重要”
summary: Sonali Pier, portfolio manager: multi-sector credit at PIMCO, and Meghan Robson, head of US credit strategy at BNP Paribas, join Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." US investment-grade bond sales reached $1 trillion sooner than in any year since 2020 as historically low spreads and a spending surge on artificial intelligence fuel borrowing by blue-chip companies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Strategic Petroleum Reserve Nears a 3-Year Low
title_cn: 美国战略石油储备接近三年低点
summary: The US buffer for crude oil is shrinking fast as the Iran war drags on. The country’s emergency petroleum stockpile, known as the Strategic Petroleum Reserve, has shrunk to levels last seen in mid-2023, after the Biden administration decided to withdraw SPR crude barrels to mitigate the oil-price impact of the Russia-Ukraine war. The global oil supply chain is becoming more vulnerable with each passing day the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stock Buyers Step In to Lift Dow Average to Record: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股票买家介入推动道琼斯平均指数创历史新高：市场结束
summary: A wave of dip buying powered a rebound in stocks as traders looked past Broadcom Inc.’s underwhelming outlook to fuel gains in several industries that tend to benefit from a resilient economy.

title: Easy Money With an Uneasy Economy
title_cn: 经济不稳定，赚钱容易
summary: Markets are flying, businesses feel less sure.

title: Private Credit’s Resurgent Redemptions
title_cn: 私人信贷的赎回复苏
summary: Bloomberg's Katie Greifeld and Olivia Fishlow speak with Jason Dillow, co-head of US private credit & head of US opportunistic credit at Man Group, on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Cliffwater, Blackstone, and Partners Group all capped certain fund redemptions this week. The moves put private markets back into the spotlight. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 贝罗：就业报告对美联储无济于事
summary:
Kelsey Berro, fixed income portfolio manager at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." They discuss Friday's US jobs report and the path forward for new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cerebras CEO on Data Centers: We Could've Been Better Neighbors

"We could've been better neighbors."

Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman admits that data center buildout could have been smoother when entering a community. Watch the interview from #BloombergTech.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Foreign Buyers Snap Up Turkish Fast-Track Share Sales
title_cn: 外国买家抢购土耳其快速通道股票销售
summary: Foreign investors are piling into fast-tracked sales of shares in Turkish companies, seeing pockets of value in a market facing political turmoil at home and fallout from the Iran war.

title: How Young Billionaires Changed Private Flying
title_cn: 年轻的亿万富翁如何改变私人飞行
summary: VistaJet President Leona Qi joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why a new generation of wealthy entrepreneurs is fueling outsize growth in private aviation. She reveals how younger billionaires prioritize efficiency over ownership, why private jets are becoming productivity tools rather than luxury purchases, and how private flight routes can predict where global wealth and investment are moving next. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Climbs as Declining Inventories Offset Worries Over Iran
title_cn: 库存下降抵消了对伊朗的担忧，铜价上涨
summary: Copper edged higher after a rise in orders for metal in London Metal Exchange warehouses, bucking a broader downtrend on the exchange as traders weighed US President Donald Trump’s fraught push to reach a peace deal with Iran.

title: Nasdaq 100 Falls as Investors Rotate From AI to Old Economy
title_cn: 随着投资者从人工智能转向旧经济，纳斯达克 100 指数下跌
summary: Investors ditched technology stocks in favor of the so-called “old economy” on Thursday as Broadcom Inc.’s earnings report pumped the brakes on the artificial-intelligence rally.

title: Honeywell-Backed Quantinuum Shares Jump 13% After Upsized IPO
title_cn: 霍尼韦尔支持的 Quantinuum 股票在扩大 IPO 后上涨 13%
summary: Quantinuum Inc., a quantum computing company backed by Honeywell International Inc., opened 13% above its listing price after raising $1.68 billion in an upsized US initial public offering.

title: Broadcom Sparks AI Rally Fears | Open Interest 6/4/2026
title_cn: 博通引发人工智能集会恐惧 |未平仓合约 2026 年 6 月 4 日
summary:
AI euphoria hits a reality check as Broadcom’s weak outlook reignites fears the chip-fueled rally has gone too far. Plus, Jamie Dimon pitches the SpaceX IPO to the bank's high-net-worth clients.  Blackstone’s private credit fund limits redemptions for the first time, VistaJet’s Leona Qi join us on the private aviation boom, Ciena CEO Gary Smith joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" on surging AI network demand, and Education Under Secretary Nicholas Kent discusses the future of struggling colleges.

Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fortress-Backed UK Retailer Faces Landlord Fight Over Debts
title_cn: Fortress 支持的英国零售商面临房东债务纠纷
summary: Poundstretcher Ltd’s plan to slash the rent on some of its stores is being challenged by two landlords, who say that the UK discount retailer’s restructuring would unfairly write off their claims.

title: Five Myths About Solar Panels Debunked
title_cn: 关于太阳能电池板的五个神话被揭穿
summary: Are solar farms really noisy, toxic and dangerous? Bloomberg Opinion columnist Mark Gongloff breaks down five common myths about solar energy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 真主党拒绝停火后美伊谈判进展陷入停滞
summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia rejected on Thursday a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.

title_cn: 电力设备公司 Innio 在 24.3 亿美元 IPO 后股价上涨 15%
summary: Shares of Innio Holding GmbH gained 15% after the gas engine maker’s biggest shareholders raised $2.43 billion in an initial public offering.

title: Whale Rock Talks AI, Waratah Sees Gold at Sohn Montreal

summary: Hedge fund managers and other investors are gathered at a conference in Montreal to pitch the next big thing, and everything from artificial intelligence, biotech and gold mining was on the table Thursday.

title: Palcos del Mundial en México desatan un mercado informal y millonario
title_cn: 墨西哥世界杯包厢释放了非正式的百万富翁市场
summary: Mientras millones de aficionados buscan entradas para el Mundial, en Ciudad de México se mueve un negocio reservado para unos pocos. Palcos con vista privilegiada se ofrecen por hasta 27 millones de pesos en un mercado paralelo que opera por WhatsApp y que enfrenta a propietarios, intermediarios, la FIFA y los administradores del Estadio Banorte. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Guadalajara apuesta al Mundial mientras persiste la crisis de desaparecidos
title_cn: 失踪人员危机持续，瓜达拉哈拉押注世界杯
summary: Entre mariachis, tequila y fútbol, Jalisco espera recibir a miles de fans del Mundial. Pero en sus mismas calles, familiares de desaparecidos mantienen viva una pregunta que aún no tiene respuesta: ¿dónde están? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Blackstone’s BCRED Caps Redemptions After Investors Seek 10%
title_cn: Blackstone 的 BCRED 在投资者寻求 10% 后设定赎回上限
summary: Blackstone Inc. limited redemptions from its flagship private credit fund for the first time after investors sought to pull 10% of the shares, the latest firm to cap withdrawals amid a continued investor exodus.

title: Bessent Says White House Asked Congress to Eliminate Gas Tax
title_cn: 贝森特称白宫要求国会取消汽油税
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says the Trump administration has asked Congress to eliminate the gas tax during testimony before the House Ways and Means Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sports City: The World Cup Keeps Getting Bigger
title_cn: 体育城：世界杯规模不断扩大
summary: Sports City is back, and this time Bloomberg News' Senior Reporter Randall Williams takes the viewers to the most watched sports showdown on Earth: The FIFA world cup. This year's games will be hosted in three countries - the US, Mexico and Canada - across 16 cities, with 48 teams competing, the most ever. Let's go! (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin Machine Is Misfiring on Every Cylinder
title_cn: 迈克尔塞勒的比特币机器每个气缸都失火了
summary: Michael Saylor built Strategy Inc. around a straightforward idea: raise money to buy Bitcoin, then never sell it. Over time, that simple bet has turned far more complicated.

title: Glazer Family Members Debate Man United Stake Sale
title_cn: 格雷泽家族成员辩论曼联股权出售
summary: Members of the billionaire Glazer family have been debating whether to sell their stake in Manchester United after decades of ownership often blighted by fan protests. Tiwa Adebayo explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jack Dorsey’s Contactless Payments Company Introduces a Wand
title_cn: 杰克·多尔西 (Jack Dorsey) 的非接触式支付公司推出了魔杖
summary: In the era of tap-to-pay, Block Inc. is trying to make things a little more enchanting.

title: Fed Weighs Need For Rate Hikes, US May Payrolls Due Out Friday | Real Yield 6/4/2026
title_cn: 美联储考虑加息的必要性，美国五月就业报告将于周五公布实际收益率 6/4/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: JPMorgan Asset Management Fixed Income Portfolio Manager Kelsey Berro, Federated Hermes Executive VP Deborah Cunningham, Man Group Co-Head of US Private Credit Jason Dillow, BNPs Paribas Head of US Credit Strategy Meghan Robson, and Pimco Portfolio Manager: Multi-Sector Credit Sonali Pier. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Shark Tank Star Shrinks Data Center Footprint After Backlash
title_cn: 鲨鱼坦克之星在强烈反对后缩小了数据中心的占地面积
summary: A proposed Utah data center that would have been almost three times the size of Manhattan will be drastically scaled back after pressure from lawmakers.

title: Hatch’s New Bedside Sleep Clock Wirelessly Tracks Sleep Quality
title_cn: Hatch 的新型床边睡眠时钟可无线跟踪睡眠质量
summary: Hatch Baby Inc., known for devices that help babies sleep, is getting into sleep-tracking for adults with a new bedside tracker called the Hatch Sleep Clock.

title: Jane Street Plans New Data Center as Computing Power Runs Scarce
title_cn: 由于计算能力匮乏，Jane Street 计划新建数据中心
summary: Jane Street Group plans to build and finance its own data center as the trading giant scales its operations to keep up with the demand for computing power.

title: Anduril's Stephens on Innovating in an Age of War
title_cn: 安杜里尔的斯蒂芬斯谈战争时代的创新
summary: Trae Stephens, Co-Founder & Executive Chairman at Anduril Industries discusses AI in defense, geopolitical risk and military innovation with Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Liftoff Mobile CEO Talks IPO, Advertising and Strategy
title_cn: Liftoff Mobile 首席执行官谈论 IPO、广告和战略
summary: Liftoff Mobile CEO Jeremy Bondy discusses the company's IPO and strategy on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Shares in Liftoff, a Blackstone-backed company, climbed 21% in their debut after raising $437 million in the company’s second attempt at going public this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung Sponsor Spotlight
title_cn: 三星赞助商聚焦
summary: Federico Casalegno, Executive Vice President of Design at Samsung Electronics speaks with Bloomberg’s Kate Moriarty about design innovation and AI-enabled experiences at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Isn’t Replacing Credit Hedge Fund Traders Yet, Barclays Says
title_cn: 巴克莱表示，人工智能尚未取代信用对冲基金交易员
summary: Hedge funds and asset managers are increasingly using artificial intelligence when investing in global credit markets, but the technology isn’t replacing human traders — at least for now, according to a survey by Barclays Plc.

title: Netflix Top Tech Exec Stone on Integrating AI
title_cn: Netflix 顶级技术执行官 Stone 谈人工智能集成
summary: Elizabeth Stone, Chief Product & Technology Officer at Netflix discusses technology leadership and scaling the platform in the AI era with Bloomberg’s Emily Chang at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic President Cites High Computing Costs as Driver for IPO
title_cn: Anthropic 总裁称高计算成本是 IPO 的推动因素
summary: Anthropic PBC co-founder and President Daniela Amodei said the high cost of developing artificial intelligence models is driving firms like hers to look to the public market for capital, days after the Claude maker confidentially filed paperwork for an IPO.

title: AI Has Become Major Capital Formation Cycle, Says Altimeter
title_cn: Altimeter 表示，人工智能已成为主要的资本形成周期
summary: Apoorv Agrawal, Altimeter capital partner, says AI has become one of the largest capital formation cycles. He also weighs in on the IPO landscape as SpaceX and Anthropic get close to going public, with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of the Bloomberg Tech event in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SaaSpocalypse Is Overblown, Says Okta CEO
title_cn: Okta 首席执行官表示 SaaSpocalypse 被夸大了
summary: Todd McKinnon, Okta CEO, discusses his outlook for the cyber security industry in the wake of Anthropic's Mythos model and concerns around its impact on security. He also says he thinks worries of a SaaSpocalypse are "overblown." He joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of the Bloomberg Tech event in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Databricks CEO: We Don't Need AI To Get Smarter
title_cn: Databricks CEO：我们不需要人工智能来变得更聪明
summary: Ali Ghodsi, Databricks co-founder & CEO, says we have already reached artificial general intelligence, but the AI is just lacking context to be more productive. He argues that is the problem everyone should focus on right now with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of the Bloomberg Tech event in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SF Fed's Daly on the Economic Impact of AI
title_cn: 旧金山联储关于人工智能对经济影响的每日报道
summary: Mary C. Daly, President & CEO at Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco discusses AI’s impact on productivity, labor markets and economic growth with Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic's Ethicist on Whether AI Can Become Conscious
title_cn: Anthropic 的伦理学家论人工智能能否变得有意识
summary: Amanda Askell, Philosopher & Ethicist at Anthropic discusses AI consciousness and managing Claude's soul, as well as safety risks and ethical guardrails with Bloomberg’s Shirin Ghaffary at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic President Amodei on the Future of Claude
title_cn: 人类总统阿莫代谈克劳德的未来
summary: Daniela Amodei, President & Co-Founder at Anthropic discusses the latest in model development, its commercialization strategy and current relations with the US government with Bloomberg’s Shirin Ghaffary at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peter Thiel’s Family Office Pays Record Rent in Miami Tower
title_cn: 彼得·蒂尔 (Peter Thiel) 家族办公室在迈阿密大厦支付创纪录的租金
summary: Peter Thiel, who has been expanding his business interests in South Florida, leased office space at Miami’s 830 Brickell skyscraper for his family office, joining a group of finance and tech heavyweights in the heart of the city’s finance district.

title: Bloomberg Tech Event Special | Bloomberg Tech 6/04/2026
title_cn: 彭博科技活动特别报道 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 4 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow host a special live show from the Bloomberg Tech event in San Francisco, where leaders from across tech and business are gathered to discuss how they can navigate economic and geopolitical uncertainty, and multiply the opportunities in today's landscape. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic’s Amodei on Pros and Cons of an AI Startup IPO
title_cn: Anthropic 的 Amodei 谈人工智能初创公司 IPO 的利弊
summary: Daniela Amodei, president and co-founder at Anthropic, said the company’s confidential IPO filing “gives us the option to potentially go public after the SEC review,” but is not able to say anything more IPO-related. She also discusses the pros and cons of going public for an AI startup. She speaks at the Bloomberg Tech Conference 2026 in San Francisco.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada to Provide Funding, Buy Equity Stakes in AI Startups
title_cn: 加拿大将提供资金并购买人工智能初创公司的股权
summary: Canada will provide funding to help artificial intelligence companies scale up, and plans to take equity stakes in the country’s most promising AI firms to accelerate the creation of so-called “national champions.”

title: Ares' Jacobson on Private Credit, Rates & Investors
title_cn: 阿瑞斯的雅各布森谈私人信贷、利率和投资者
summary: Ares Management Corporation’s co-president Blair Jacobson said there’s a “real disconnect” between negative headlines about private credit and what the firm is seeing across its portfolio companies. Jacobson said companies worldwide are reporting annual growth of 8% to 12%, and non-accrual rates are lower than the company has seen historically. He joined "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Corrects spelling of name in headline.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed's Daly Says Forward Guidance Could Be Misleading
title_cn: 美联储戴利表示前瞻性指引可能具有误导性
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco President Mary Daly says monetary policy is in a good place, but there's too much uncertainty ahead. She's also bullish on artificial intelligence, but has seen no proof yet that it leads to productivity gains. Daly speaks on "Bloomberg Tech" from the Bloomberg Tech conference in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon on the Coming Mega IPOs
title_cn: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门谈即将到来的大型首次公开募股
summary:
As companies like Anthropic and SpaceX file to go public, 2026 may turn out to be a year of mega IPOs.

Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway on the Odd Lots podcast to discuss banking in the age of AI and why it's still "good for the US to have the biggest, most important companies in the world."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Databricks CEO Plans to Avoid IPO During Year of Huge Offerings
title_cn: Databricks 首席执行官计划在巨额发行之年避免 IPO
summary: Databricks, a data software company, plans to sell shares to the public at some point, but won’t tap the public markets this year amid a flurry of planned tech IPOs.

title: Verizon CEO Says AI Is Coming for Customer Service Jobs
title_cn: Verizon 首席执行官表示人工智能将取代客户服务工作
summary: The downtown skyline of San Francisco. Photographer: Jason Henry/Bloomberg

title: Court Blocks Order for US Official to Testify on Tariff Refunds
title_cn: 法院阻止美国官员就关税退款作证
summary: A federal appeals court has for now suspended a judge’s order to compel Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Rodney Scott to testify about the Trump administration’s efforts to refund $166 billion in tariffs declared unlawful by the US Supreme Court earlier this year.

title: Bessent Says US Could Do Country-Specific Waiver for Russian Oil
title_cn: 贝森特称美国可以对俄罗斯石油实行特定国家的豁免
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said future waivers allowing countries to purchase oil from Russia could be granted on a country-by-country basis rather than across the board.

title: Blue Origin Still in Running for Top Satellite Launches, US Says
title_cn: 美国称蓝色起源仍在争夺顶级卫星发射机会
summary: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin LLC remains eligible to be certified for bidding against Elon Musk’s SpaceX for lucrative US military space launches after last week’s launchpad explosion, the Space Force’s acquisition branch said.

title: US Races to Contain Deadly Screwworm Threatening Cattle Supply
title_cn: 美国竞相遏制威胁牛供应的致命螺旋虫
summary: The US Department of Agriculture is racing to contain the deadly New World screwworm after a case was detected in Texas, where a broader outbreak could threaten an already-small domestic cattle herd.

title: Supreme Court Bolsters SEC’s Power to Recoup Illegal Gains
title_cn: 最高法院增强 SEC 追回非法收益的权力
summary: The US Supreme Court reinforced the Securities and Exchange Commission’s power to recover illegal profits in a case that centered on one of the agency’s most potent enforcement tools.

title: US Judge Warns DOJ Appeal Could Upend Trump Tariff Refunds
title_cn: 美国法官警告司法部上诉可能会颠覆特朗普关税退款
summary: A US trade judge took the unusual step of personally responding to the Trump administration’s appeal of his order to refund $166 billion in tariffs the Supreme Court declared unlawful, calling the government’s filings “colorful” and questioning its legal stance.

title: Colombia’s Cepeda Joins Petro in Dropping Constitution Rewrite
title_cn: 哥伦比亚 Cepeda 与 Petro 一起放弃宪法重写
summary: Presidential candidate Iván Cepeda praised a decision to halt efforts to convene a constituent assembly to rewrite Colombia’s constitution, joining President Gustavo Petro in backing away from the unpopular proposal as the left seeks to win over centrist voters ahead of this month’s election runoff.

title: AMLO Breaks Silence to Back Sheinbaum Amid Tensions With US
title_cn: 在与美国关系紧张之际，奥夫拉多尔打破沉默支持希恩鲍姆
summary: Mexico’s former President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador, who repeatedly pledged to stay out of politics after leaving office, issued a public statement backing President Claudia Sheinbaum and criticizing growing US pressure on her government.

title: Trump Says He Plans to Nominate Blanche for Attorney General
title_cn: 特朗普表示他计划提名布兰奇担任司法部长
summary: President Donald Trump announced that he planned to soon make Todd Blanche, who leads the Justice Department on an acting basis, the “permanent attorney general,” a move that would install a fervent loyalist at the top of the nation’s law enforcement apparatus.

title: Rep. Doggett Accuses Bessent of 'Deception' Over Trump Audit
title_cn: 众议员多格特指责贝森特在特朗普审计中“欺骗”
summary: US Representative Lloyd Doggett grills Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent for not auditing President Donald Trump's finances during testimony before the House Ways and Means Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Says Quick Jury Trial Not Needed on FCC Fines
title_cn: 最高法院表示不需要对 FCC 罚款进行快速陪审团审判
summary: The US Supreme Court ruled that telecommunications companies can’t immediately demand a jury trial when hit with a Federal Communications Commission fine, while saying the carriers need not to pay penalties right away.

title: Romanian President Nominates Adviser Tomac for Premiership
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统提名总理顾问托马克
summary: Romanian President Nicusor Dan nominated his adviser, Eugen Tomac, as prime minister in a bid to end a political crisis and tackle one of the European Union’s widest budget deficits.

title: Italy, US and France at Odds Over Next Special Envoy to Bosnia
title_cn: 意大利、美国和法国在下任波斯尼亚特使问题上存在分歧
summary: Key nations tasked with selecting the next special envoy to Bosnia and Herzegovina are at odds over whom to appoint to the role and what kind of weight it should carry, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: French Billionaire Pleads for Law Change to Disinherit Kids
title_cn: 法国亿万富翁呼吁修改法律以剥夺儿童的继承权
summary: French billionaire Pierre-Edouard Sterin, who has stirred controversy over his right-wing politics, is pleading with lawmakers to modify rules so he can disinherit his five children, saying he prefers to give his fortune to charity.

title: Iran Says No Progress in US Talks
title_cn: 伊朗表示与美国的谈判没有取得进展
summary:
Iran said there had been no recent progress in talks with the US over an interim peace deal, while fighting persisted in Lebanon despite Washington’s declaration of a ceasefire between Israel and the country.
Dr. Lindsay Newman, Associate Fellow at Chatham House, discusses the latest out of the Middle East as US, Iran talks continue and fighting persists in Lebanon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-Ukraine Foreign Minister Warns Europe Against Putin Talks
title_cn: 乌克兰前外长警告欧洲不要与普京会谈
summary: A Western European initiative to bring Russia into peace talks with Ukraine risks increasing the pressure on Kyiv for concessions, according to Ukraine’s former top diplomat.

title: Hungary to Back Year-Long Extension of EU Sanctions on Russia
title_cn: 匈牙利支持欧盟对俄罗斯制裁延长一年
summary: Hungary said it will back a full year’s extension of the European Union’s sanctions against Russia in a major reversal from its previous role in stonewalling the process, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: How Funding Cuts Left the World Vulnerable to Ebola
title_cn: 资金削减如何使世界容易受到埃博拉病毒的影响
summary: A strain with no known treatment or vaccine is spreading fast, and the international system built to contain outbreaks is in crisis.

title: Trump Wins Delay to Jan. 6 Civil Suits During Bid for Immunity
title_cn: 特朗普在争取豁免期间赢得了推迟 1 月 6 日民事诉讼
summary: A federal judge granted President Donald Trump’s request to again pause a collection of lawsuits seeking to hold him responsible for violence at the US Capitol five years ago while he pursues an immunity defense.

title: LinkedIn China Spying Threat Prompts Warning From US, Allies
title_cn: LinkedIn 中国间谍威胁引发美国及其盟友的警告
summary: The US and its “Five Eyes” intelligence partners issued what they said was an unprecedented joint notice warning about attempts by Chinese spies to use websites such as LinkedIn to recruit assets.

title: Starmer Says Musk Is Sowing UK Division After Teen’s Murder
title_cn: 斯塔默称，青少年谋杀案后，马斯克正在英国分部
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer accused Elon Musk of stoking unrest in Britain after the world’s richest man used the murder of a British teen to say official UK police policy requires officers to be racist against White people.

title: Greer Says ‘Deal’s a Deal’ for Those With Capped US Tariffs
title_cn: 格里尔表示，对于美国关税上限的国家来说，“协议就是协议”
summary: President Donald Trump’s trade chief signaled confidence the administration can roll out new tariffs without breaking terms of bilateral agreements, saying “a deal’s a deal” for economies like the European Union and Japan that negotiated caps on the US levies collected on their shipments.

title: Iran Allows Bushehr Nuclear Inspection, Stonewalls Over Uranium
title_cn: 伊朗允许布什尔核检查，在铀问题上设置障碍
summary: Iran permitted monitors at the United Nations atomic watchdog this week to visit its Bushehr nuclear power plant while stonewalling inspectors’ demands to verify the condition and location of its enriched uranium stockpile.

title: Hiring Has Expanded Beyond Healthcare, Richardson Says
title_cn: 理查森表示，招聘范围已经扩展到医疗保健之外
summary: ADP Chief Economist Nela Richardson says the latest payroll data shows hiring has finally broadened beyond health care, with gains across eight out of ten major sectors. US initial jobless claims did rise by 13,000 in the week ending May 30. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kuwait Bears Brunt of Iranian Response to US Ship Attacks
title_cn: 科威特首当其冲受到伊朗对美国船只袭击事件的回应
summary: Kuwait, a staunch US ally, has become a key target of Iran as its ceasefire with Washington frays and their clashes escalate.

title: Democrats to Target Trump IRS Immunity in Hearing, Senate Votes
title_cn: 民主党人将在听证会和参议院投票中针对特朗普国税局豁免权
summary: The Treasury secretary has so far demurred, citing ongoing litigation and attorney-client privilege

title: Singapore Denies Forced Labor Claims After Trump Tariff Move
title_cn: 特朗普关税举措后，新加坡否认强迫劳动指控
summary: Singapore denied forced labor allegations from the US, responding after President Donald Trump proposed new tariffs linked to the practice in an attempt to rebuild his protectionist wall.

title: UK and France Finalize Postwar Hormuz Mine-Clearing Mission
title_cn: 英国和法国完成战后霍尔木兹扫雷任务
summary: The UK and France have finalized plans to lead a multinational mine-clearing mission in the Strait of Hormuz within days of an agreement between the US and Iran to reopen the waterway, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: UK Job Cut Notices Surge to Highest Since 2020 as Iran War Bites
title_cn: 伊朗战争爆发，英国裁员通知激增至 2020 年以来最高
summary: The number of British workers that face losing their jobs jumped to its highest in more than five years, the latest sign that the labor market is deteriorating amid the economic effects of conflict in the Middle East.
